name: 1WIN Settings | BeMob Help Center
snippet: To pass click ID manually the sub1= {clickId} part should be added at the end of each offer URL from 1WIN and the automatic click ID passing should be switched off in the 1WIN template. Here is the sample of 1WIN template and offer settings, when you decide to pass the click ID manually.
